headline: How MetLife’s PineBridge Deal and Private Credit Push Could Reshape MET’s Investment Identity
summary: In recent days, MetLife announced that MetLife Investment Management originated about US$26 billion of private fixed income transactions in 2025 and, following its December 2025 acquisition of PineBridge Investments, now oversees roughly US$741.70 billion in total assets under management, ahead of releasing its first-quarter 2026 results on May 6. These moves significantly enlarge MetLife’s asset management footprint and diversify its fee-based income, potentially altering how investors...

headline: UBS Raises its Price Target on MetLife (MET) to $102
summary: MetLife, Inc. (NYSE:MET) is one of the 8 Cheap Large Cap Stocks to Buy Now. On April 9, 2026, UBS raised the price target on MetLife, Inc. (NYSE:MET) to $102 from $98 and maintained a Buy rating. UBS said the update reflects changes across the North American life insurance group ahead of Q1 earnings, noting […]
